mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( title, content, created_at, modified_at, view_count, category, is_notice, file_path, member_id ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, #{category}, 0, NULL, #{memberId} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.content, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.modified_at AS modifiedAt, b.view_count AS viewCount, b.category, b.is_notice AS isNotice, b.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickName FROM board b INNER JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.content, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.modified_at AS modifiedAt, b.view_count AS viewCount, b.category, b.is_notice AS isNotice, b.member_id AS memberId, b.file_path AS filePath, m.nickname AS nickName FROM board b INNER JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.member_id AS memberId, b.title, b.content, m.nickname AS nickName, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.modified_at AS modifiedAt, b.view_count AS viewCount, b.category, b.is_notice AS isNotice, b.file_path AS filePath FROM board b INNER JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.is_notice DESC, b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC LIMIT #{pageDto.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageDto.offset}
